name: Average Settlements for Chemical Burns in South Salt Lake

mainEntity.name: What are average settlements for chemical burns in South Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: What are average settlements for chemical burns in South Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: $50k-$250k for chemical burns, based on scarring, disability % and lost wages.

suggestedAnswer.text: South Salt Lake acute burns settle higher with photos/scar ratings. Chronic lower. Factors: med bills, future care. Averages from verdicts; yours varies. Negotiate post-MMI for max PPD.

description: $50k-$250k for chemical burns, based on scarring, disability % and lost wages.
